mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_relation(id, source_id, target_id, relation_type, status, group_id, version, create_time) VALUES(#{id}, #{sourceId}, #{targetId}, #{relationType}, #{status}, #{groupId}, #{version}, #{createTime}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE status = VALUES(status), group_id = VALUES(group_id), version = user_relation.version + 1, create_time = VALUES(create_time)
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_relation WHERE source_id = #{sourceId} AND target_id = #{targetId} AND relation_type = #{relationType}
